driver_subject: ixgbe: propagate XFRM offload state direction instead of flags
kernel_subject: xfrm: store and rely on direction to construct offload flags
stage1_reason: Driver changes replace XFRM_OFFLOAD_INBOUND flag check with XFRM_DEV_OFFLOAD_IN direction enum, indicating kernel XFRM offload API migration from flags to direction-based interface.
stage2_reason: Driver commit changes XFRM_OFFLOAD_INBOUND flag to XFRM_DEV_OFFLOAD_IN direction enum, matching kernel commit that introduces direction-based XFRM offload API migration from flags to direction enum.
